notable_excerpts: Employees logged over 40 million learning hours year-to-date and acquired 3.8 million competencies.
Our workforce continues to be very diverse with 152 nationalities represented and with women making 35.3% of the base.
We are proud to have recognized the exceptional contributions of our associates by awarding over 25,000 well-deserved promotions across levels.
The Board has recommended a dividend of ₹76 per share, which includes an interim dividend of ₹10 and a special dividend of ₹66 per share.
It's a Board decision to announce the special dividend this quarter or decide on the capital allocation policy.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call transcript for TCS Q3 FY25 shows a strong focus on social aspects, particularly in employee development and diversity. Governance is addressed through discussions on capital allocation and board decisions. However, there is a lack of environmental disclosures, resulting in a low overall ESG score.
